arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Route 53 Resolver firewall rule group association.

creation_time.description: The time when the firewall rule group association was created.

creator_request_id.description: A unique string that identifies the request that created the firewall rule group association.

firewall_rule_group_id.description: The ID of the firewall rule group that is associated with the VPC.

id.description: The ID of the firewall rule group association.

managed_owner_name.description: The name of the AWS account that manages the firewall rule group association.

modification_time.description: The time when the firewall rule group association was last modified.

mutation_protection.description: Indicates whether mutation protection is enabled for the firewall rule group association.

name.description: The name of the firewall rule group association.

priority.description: The priority of the firewall rule group association. Lower values indicate higher priority.

status.description: The current status of the firewall rule group association.

status_message.description: A message that provides additional information about the status of the firewall rule group association.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC that is associated with the firewall rule group.
